name: bynk-playground
description: The Bynk in-browser REPL/playground (in-browser track, slice 4). A fully static, client-side app: compile Bynk to JS in wasm, run it in a cross-origin sandboxed iframe + Web Worker. Deploys to playground.bynk-lang.org (app) + sandbox.bynk-lang.org (execution).

scripts.build:all: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:grammar && npm run build
